crime.value: Assassination by stabbing - Karl-Ludwig Sand stabs Kotzebue to the heart in his home
crime.quote: Sand at once stabbed him to the heart; Kotzebue gave one cry, staggered, and fell back into an arm-chair: he was dead.

victim.value: Kotzebue - targeted for his political views or writings that made him an enemy to Sand's cause
victim.quote: recognise him by the description. Kotzebue chanced to take another path.

culprit_and_motive.value: Karl-Ludwig Sand committed premeditated assassination - motive appears political/ideological based on his methodical planning
culprit_and_motive.quote: Sand then performed the drama which he had rehearsed upon his friend

resolution.value: Sand is captured after failed suicide attempt and later executed - justice served through legal process
resolution.quote: asked leave to have a new scaffold made at his own expense, so that no other criminal might be executed

investigator.value: Historical narrator/chronicler - Dumas presenting the case as historical true crime rather than detective story
investigator.quote: Our readers will judge better from this anecdote than from anything more we could say

clue_fairness.value: Sand's movements and preparations are documented transparently - his notebook entries, timing, and reconnaissance attempts
clue_fairness.quote: Left Wanheim at five in the morning, came in sight of Mannheim at a quarter-past nine.

social_world.value: German student political hierarchy and academic social structures - Sand as student revolutionary targeting established authority
social_world.quote: wearing the dress of a German student, which consists of a short frock-coat with silk braiding

alibi.value: Sand's open movements provide no alibi - he dines publicly, makes multiple visits, maintains visible presence before the act
alibi.quote: he dined with an appearance of such calmness, and even of such happiness, that his conversation...was remarked

reveal_mechanic.value: The assassination is revealed through direct dramatic performance - Sand 'performed the drama which he had rehearsed'
reveal_mechanic.quote: Sand then performed the drama which he had rehearsed upon his friend

media_and_audience.value: Sand becomes martyred figure - scaffold wood becomes shrine, pilgrims visit, handkerchiefs collect blood as relics
media_and_audience.quote: cottage became a shrine for pilgrims...those who wiped the blood from the scaffold with their handkerchiefs

_meta.title: ebook alexandre dumas pere karl ludwig sand
